word: G3185 - μεῖζον - meîzon - mide'-zon - The more

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μεῖζον

- Transliteration: meizon

- Phonetic: mide'-zon

- Definition:

1. of greater degree, even more

- Origin: neuter of G3187

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Neuter of G3187; (adverbially) in a greater degree: - the more.
